title: Executor Result Validator must paginate exact-head check runs

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Pre-merge branch head. Rebound to the true merge SHA by ops:proof-generate --merge-sha during post-merge lane-close reconciliation (this object's presence is what makes this file rebindable -- see rebindEvidenceJsonSha in scripts/ops/proof-generate.ts).

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

r_level.command: pnpm exec tsx scripts/ci/r-level-check.ts --base origin/main --head HEAD

runtime_proof.note: This lane changes only a CI-gate GitHub Actions workflow and its ops-tooling helper module -- no production pick-pipeline code path or migration is touched. Live DB smoke and table counts were recaptured during the governed stale-lane reconciliation because T1 truth checks require structured runtime evidence.

queries.description: Live database-smoke submission persistence and cleanup
Live database-smoke pick persistence, lifecycle transitions, and cleanup
Live lifecycle inserts and rejected-transition count assertions
Live enqueue, claim, rollback, and idempotency assertions
Live rollback and additive settlement audit assertions
Live additive settlement and correction assertions

not_changed: the unrelated lane where the defect was observed

known_gaps: This fix has not yet been exercised live against a real >30-check-run commit through GitHub Actions (only locally, via synthetic unit-test fixtures) -- live confirmation happens when this PR's own commits accumulate check-runs.
